body:
Fixes #100

## Summary

- Replace Rust Google Docs `--capture browser` model capture with a real headless Chrome CDP flow that injects a `DOCS_modelChunk` hook before navigation and reads the model with `Runtime.evaluate`; the browser path no longer falls back to direct editor HTML.
- Fix JS and Rust browser-model table parsing for the live Google Docs `0x0a` plus `0x1c` separator pattern while preserving intentionally empty cells.
- Keep nested ordered Google Docs lists ordered and tightly grouped across separate per-level list ids in both runtimes.
- Carry Rust browser-model `docs-images-rt` URLs into archive mode, download them into `images/`, and rewrite markdown/html references.
- Add issue #100 regression tests, live public-doc assertions, a JS patch changeset, and a reproducible case study under `docs/case-studies/issue-100/`.

## Reproduction Evidence

- Before-fix JS failures: `docs/case-studies/issue-100/logs/js-gdocs-test-before-fix.log`
- Before-fix Rust failures: `docs/case-studies/issue-100/logs/rust-gdocs-test-before-fix.log`
- Raw live model dump: `docs/case-studies/issue-100/experiments/model-dump/model-data.json`
- Post-fix Rust browser markdown: `docs/case-studies/issue-100/reference/rust-browser-after-raw-cdp.md`
- Post-fix Rust browser archive: `docs/case-studies/issue-100/reference/rust-browser-archive-after.zip`
- Case study: https://github.com/link-assistant/web-capture/blob/issue-100-99e0a350ea14/docs/case-studies/issue-100/README.md

## Verification

- `cd js && npm test -- --runTestsByPath tests/unit/gdocs.test.js tests/integration/gdocs-public-doc.test.js --runInBand`  
  Result: 84 passed, 7 skipped, 2 suites passed.
- `cd js && npm run lint`  
  Result: passed with existing warning-level complexity findings.
- `cd js && npm run format:check`  
  Result: passed.
- `node scripts/validate-changeset.mjs`  
  Result: passed.
- `cd rust && cargo test --test integration gdocs:: -- --nocapture`  
  Result: 41 passed.
- `cd rust && cargo test --test integration gdocs_public_doc:: -- --nocapture`  
  Result: 8 passed; live tests skipped unless enabled.
- `cd rust && GDOCS_INTEGRATION=1 RUST_LOG=off cargo test --test integration gdocs_public_doc::live_browser_model_capture_of_public_document_preserves_markdown_features -- --nocapture`  
  Result: passed against the public Google Doc.
- `cd rust && cargo fmt --all -- --check`  
  Result: passed.
- `cd rust && cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`  
  Result: passed.
- Live Rust archive smoke command produced `document.md`, `document.html`, and four localized images; see `docs/case-studies/issue-100/logs/rust-browser-archive-after-listing.log`.

## CI

Fresh pull-request workflows on commit `0399c15` passed:

- JavaScript Checks and Release: success (run 24722097698)
- Rust Checks and Release: success (run 24722097721)
